purpose: Hermetic stress orchard for pthread/malloc/stdio interleavings. Each scenario is a deterministic, bounded-iteration replay with a fixed PCG32 seed; the manifest is the source of truth for which scenarios exist, what oracles they assert, which iteration tiers they ship, and where their structured-log evidence lands. The harness gate verifies the manifest's structural invariants and refuses to advertise stress coverage in support_matrix/release surfaces unless every cited scenario row is currently sealed.

execution_policy.rationale: Heavy stress runs perturb shared local CI capacity and confound failure attribution; rch isolates worker target_dirs and preserves source_commit + run_id. Local runs are explicitly opt-in via FRANKENLIBC_STRESS_LOCAL=1.

iteration_tiers.intent: Default CI tier. Each scenario must complete inside ~5s wall time on rch under load.
Pre-release tier; ~5min wall time. Opt-in only.

scenarios.description: N threads loop bounded_iter times allocating + freeing varying sizes (8B..64KB) drawn from a deterministic PCG32 stream. Asserts: no double-free, no leak (bytes_in_use returns to zero at scenario end), no fingerprint/canary corruption.

N threads share one FILE* under different buffering modes (unbuffered / line-buffered / fully-buffered) writing deterministic fixed-length records; reader thread reassembles. Asserts: no torn writes (record boundaries preserved), no buffer overflow under contention.

init -> lock/unlock cycles -> destroy with recursive and error-checking attributes. Asserts: pthread_mutex_destroy on a held mutex returns EBUSY (POSIX); double-init detected when policy table indicates strict.
Producer/consumer with bounded queue under condvar broadcast + signal mixed wakeups. Asserts: no missed wakeups, no spurious unblock failures, FIFO-by-arrival ordering preserved on signal-only wake.

Mixed reader/writer rwlock workload with deterministic interleavings. Asserts: writer-starvation bound (writers complete within K reader cycles under hardened mode), tryrdlock/trywrlock return values match POSIX state.

Threads register cleanup handlers, transition through deferred/async cancellation states, exit by pthread_cancel. Asserts: cleanup handlers run in LIFO order, cancellation point semantics preserved, no leaked mutex on cancel.
Issue oversize / wraparound malloc requests under hardened mode; assert deterministic Repair=ClampSize action with bounded clamp and ENOMEM on too-large.
snprintf/fprintf with deliberate format-overflow inputs under hardened mode; assert deterministic Repair=Truncate action and matching errno/return-value contract.
